Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Conditional Acquisition of Orchid River Energy JSC by Mekong Lantern Holdings LLC
Overview: Investor to acquire 35% via private placement of new shares and a call option over certain renewable subsidiaries; target signing Q3 2026 with staged closings.

Insider list: Insider list as of 02 Jun 2026 includes Ms. Lê Thảo Vy (CFO, Employee ID OR-0291), Mr. Nguyễn Quang Hiếu (Head of Cybersecurity, ID OR-8812), and Mr. Trần Minh Kiên (Corporate Secretary, ID OR-0074); updates to be filed to the Company Secretary.
Blackout and conduct: Blackout window from signing until TPSE disclosure; no tipping or selective disclosure; all diligence through encrypted data room access; breach constitutes a termination event.
Employee arrangements: Retention pool of 1.5% in RSUs for key employees; cybersecurity remediation bonus for Mr. Nguyễn Quang Hiếu; HR contact: hr@orchidriver.vn.

Overview: Investor to acquire 35% via private placement of new shares and a call option over certain renewable subsidiaries; target signing Q3 2026 with staged closings.

Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Conditional Acquisition of Orchid River Energy JSC by Mekong Lantern Holdings LLC
Parties and contacts: Orchid River Energy JSC (issuer) represented by Ms. Lê Thảo Vy, CFO, le.vy@orchidriver.vn, +84 93 552 4491; Mekong Lantern Holdings LLC (investor) represented by Mr. Phan Bảo Siêu, Managing Director, sieu.phan@mekonglantern.com.
Overview: Investor to acquire 35% via private placement of new shares and a call option over certain renewable subsidiaries; target signing Q3 2026 with staged closings.
Valuation and price: Pre-money valuation VND 2,400,000,000,000; issuance of 48,000,000 new ordinary shares at VND 50,000 per share; 10% purchase price in escrow at Annam Trust Bank.
Listing context: Issuer is listed on Tân Phú Securities Exchange (TPSE); transaction subject to Vietnam Securities Law disclosures and PSC-VN approval for a private placement to a strategic investor.
MNPI: Non-public ESG/climate event — renegotiation of PPAs with Northern Grid Company for 220 MW solar portfolio; and an unannounced cyber incident disrupting hydro plant SCADA telemetry since 27 May 2026, both likely to have a material price impact.
Crypto/DPT: Issuer is negotiating a pilot tokenization of green certificates on the LotusChain network, with a pending sandbox application to PSC-VN; no public announcement and contingent on technical due diligence of custodial wallets.
Insider list: Insider list as of 02 Jun 2026 includes Ms. Lê Thảo Vy (CFO, Employee ID OR-0291), Mr. Nguyễn Quang Hiếu (Head of Cybersecurity, ID OR-8812), and Mr. Trần Minh Kiên (Corporate Secretary, ID OR-0074); updates to be filed to the Company Secretary.
Information barriers: Investor to implement and certify information barriers between advisory and trading desks; no proprietary trading of OREN shares or derivatives until public disclosure on TPSE.
Blackout and conduct: Blackout window from signing until TPSE disclosure; no tipping or selective disclosure; all diligence through encrypted data room access; breach constitutes a termination event.
Conditions precedent: (i) PSC-VN approval; (ii) cyber remediation to restore at least 95% plant telemetry; (iii) ESG KPIs for water intensity (<1.6 m3/MWh) and carbon intensity (<120 gCO2/kWh); (iv) consent of existing VND term lenders.
Commercial terms: Representations include absence of undisclosed data breaches post-27 May 2026 and accuracy of crypto wallet governance; break fee VND 30,000,000,000; MAC includes failure of the tokenization sandbox or adverse PPA tariff changes >5%.
Funding and banking: Settlement to Account No. 456-777999 at Mekong Sun Bank – District 7 Branch; escrow agent: Annam Trust Bank, Hoi An; SWIFT-like routing per bank instructions.
Employee arrangements: Retention pool of 1.5% in RSUs for key employees; cybersecurity remediation bonus for Mr. Nguyễn Quang Hiếu; HR contact: hr@orchidriver.vn.
Education/marketing note: The company’s operations handbook offers general ESG scoring and crypto custody explanations for staff training and marketing and does not contain issuer-specific performance or deal details.
Regulatory and notices: Formal notices to Investor and Issuer contacts via email and courier; draft TPSE disclosure prepared but not released; filings to PSC-VN within 24 hours post-signing.
Confidentiality: Parties acknowledge this term sheet contains MNPI under Vietnamese law; distribution is limited to named recipients on the insider list; unauthorized sharing may trigger penalties and reporting.
